infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ShopMind uses your location to alert you when you are near a grocery store that has items from your list.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ShopMind uses your location in the background to alert you when you are near a grocery store.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ShopMind uses your location to find nearby grocery stores.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ShopMind uses your camera to scan product barcodes and add them to your list.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ShopMind uses your location to alert you when you are near a grocery store that has items on your list.

plugins.cameraPermission: ShopMind uses your camera to scan product barcodes and add them to your list.
